content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Attached please find the business update for SCS, Lovito, and warehouse for
our discussion tomorrow. Thank you!

Best,
Jinyu

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 6

   - Can help me compare Aug and Sep?
And Sep and Oct?

Generally we need to
   start growing or else the business starts to become not very exciting
   - Can show me what is our contribution to the CB business and the trend
   over the past few months and next few months?

I do not think we can keep
   using the reason of increasing rates, cause that impacts CB sellers as well
   - And our Shop P&L keeps dropping by so much



Slide 8

   - Listing price of USD 9.4, is it before or after discount?

I find it
   hard to reconcile the huge discrepancy between listing and actual selling
   price. <50%..
   - Has our IOR changed over the past months, is there any way to push for
   higher IOR?

Slide 9

   - What determines pass/fail right now?

Slide 11

   - Why is our APT slower than UST sellers for PO products?

Slide 12

   - So it can be profitable but overall impact to P&L is not big?

We will
   make about 30K USD/month to operate Miniso?
- Does this include us managing LFF for them?

Slide 14

   - Do not quite understand what this is about



Slide 16

   - Seems quite bad in general?

Our content contribution is so much worser
   than CB sellers?

- The increase in PH and TH will also affect all CB sellers..



Slide 20

   - What other levers do we have to increase Bundle order as % of Shop?
When we compare this with UST sellers how does it look?
- What is our IOR right now?
And who does it compare with UST sellers?

Slide 21

   - What other levers do we have to increase high ASP order as % of Shop?
When we compare this with UST sellers how does it look?

Slide 23

   - Can we exclude NNWH in the individual countries achievement?

I like to
   understand how each country look right now
   - BS value seem to have increase quite a bit MOM?

Is this caused by
   increase in LFF?

Slide 38

   - Similarly, can help me compare trend of Aug – Oct?

- Am concerned that we are not growing



Slide 41

   - Think this is probably too little and too slow in Chris’ mind
   - Nothing in VN?
Nothing in SG?
- So late to start for TH and MY?

Slide 52

   - Not sure the Alfilo one makes sense?

I do not even know how that will
   help in improving brand



Slide 53

   - How is the popularity of Barbie in our markets?
- Is the min. guarantee 100k or 200k?
Not very clear to me right now?

Slide 54

   - Why will we only have 50 listings?

We will need to keep churning out
   new sku in the time period right?
- When will breakeven?

Including payment of min. guarantee



Slide 55

   - Do we know the ADO and ABS of Barbie Fashion on Shopee right now?

Do
   we have the breakdown by markets?

Slide 56

   - Will need to understand existing ADO of fashion products with their
   brands
   - Will need to understand the orders we need to hit to breakeven



Others

   - How to we compare the ADO collaboration contribution from KOLs to IP
   right now?
- And how about if we compare by breakeven timeline as well?

Which is
   faster?

Slide 69

   - Why is our COGS and WH cost so much higher than CB seller?

Slide 85

   - Did announcement to tighten APT help to get more sellers?
- How did announcement go?
- How about the next announcement which will increase changes to NN WH?
Will we take the chance to get more sellers into Anbo FBS?

Slide 87

   - This is still not clear to me. What is the seller overlap, what is the
   cost savings between this and sellers putting into LFF or even their own WH
   in CN













*From:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Sent:* Thursday, 18 September 2025 12:01 pm
*To:* 'Jinyu Du' <jinyu.du@shopee.com>
*Cc:* 'Ning Li' <ning.li@shopee.com>; 'Larry Lin' <larry.lin@shopee.com>;

update_2025.09.18



Thanks.



Slide 6

And Sep and Oct?

I do not think we can keep

Slide 8

I find it

   price. <50%..
   - Has our IOR changed over the past months, is there any way to push for
   higher IOR?

Slide 9

   - What determines pass/fail right now?

Slide 11

   - Why is our APT slower than UST sellers for PO products?

Slide 12

   - So it can be profitable but overall impact to P&L is not big?

We will
   make about 30K USD/month to operate Miniso?
- Does this include us managing LFF for them?

Slide 14

   - Do not quite understand what this is about



Slide 16

   - Seems quite bad in general?

Our content contribution is so much worser
   than CB sellers?

- The increase in PH and TH will also affect all CB sellers..



Slide 20

   - What other levers do we have to increase Bundle order as % of Shop?
When we compare this with UST sellers how does it look?
- What is our IOR right now?
And who does it compare with UST sellers?

Slide 21

   - What other levers do we have to increase high ASP order as % of Shop?
When we compare this with UST sellers how does it look?

Slide 23

   - Can we exclude NNWH in the individual countries achievement?

I like to
   understand how each country look right now
   - BS value seem to have increase quite a bit MOM?

Is this caused by
   increase in LFF?
By the way, did we send a to-do list post the meeting?

content.question: Are we sure we captured all the to-dos?

#1 – I remember asking about PRM spend and why we are not getting our share
vs other CB sellers



For Lovito

   - Where did we land on where we see longer term growth coming from?

I am
   not sure IP/KOL collaboration will get us there?
- How about bags?
Where did we land post the last IP discussion?
